nasb.text: and thus you shall say, ‘Have a long life, peace be to you, and peace be to your house, and peace be to all that you have.

esv.text: And thus you shall greet him: ‘Peace be to you, and peace be to your house, and peace be to all that you have.

cnv.text: 你們要這樣說：‘願你長壽！願你平安！願你的家平安！願你所有的一切都平安！

ccb.text: 对拿八说：“愿你和你全家平安，愿你一切顺利！
